title: Pixel-Hud
description: Pixel-Hud is here to have a simple and customizable Hud
body:
# Pixel-Hud Mod

Enhance your Minecraft gameplay experience with Pixel-Hud! This mod provides a customizable heads-up display (HUD) that allows you to monitor various in-game elements. From player coordinates to armor and item status.

Need Cloth Config API
## Features

 You can choose the position, text color, and background color to suit your preferences for every element.

- **Player Coordinates:** Keep track of your X, Y, and Z coordinates with a customizable HUD.

- **Armor and Item Display:** Monitor the durability and quantity of your armor and held items.

- **Elytra Information:** For adventurers using Elytra, the mod displays remaining durability and other relevant information.

- **Time Display:** Stay aware of the in-game time with a stylish time display.

- **FPS Display:** Keep an eye on your game's frames per second (FPS) with a customizable FPS display.

## Configuration

Pixel-Hud comes with an easy-to-use configuration menu accessible in-game with a key or with ModMenu
